name: Elecrow CrowPanel Advanced 10.1in ESP32-P4 HMI
recoveryInstructions: Use the USB port labeled UART0, slide POWER to ON, and close other serial monitors.
Also connect the USB 2.0 port for power; the 10.1 inch screen draws more than UART0 alone can supply.
Hold BOOT, press and release RST, then release BOOT to enter download mode.
Run Flash again. After a successful flash, press RST or reconnect power.
